alliances.name: Left Democratic Front
alliances.description: Left-wing coalition led by CPI(M). Has governed Kerala alternately since 1980. Includes CPI(M), CPI, RSP, and smaller left parties.

alliances.name: United Democratic Front
alliances.description: Centre-left coalition led by INC. Includes Indian National Congress, IUML, KC(M), and allied parties.

alliances.name: National Democratic Alliance
alliances.description: Right-wing national coalition led by BJP. Marginal presence in Kerala state politics.

alliances.name: No Alliance / Independent
alliances.description: Used for pre-alliance era governments or independent formations.
